afterSnapshot.name: computeWindAlert
afterSnapshot.purpose: Decide whether current wind gusts exceed a threshold and produce a short human-readable message.

context.userMessage: Approved — build it, then run the tests and checks to verify.

rationale: The threshold-comparison logic is extracted as a pure function so it is unit-testable without network and keeps the handler thin.
implementation: Mirrors the computeBestWindow pattern: a pure, closure-free helper that reads current.windGusts, compares strictly against the threshold, and returns the alert flag plus an echoed gusts/threshold and a per-branch message.
